news_bbc.title: EasyJet agrees to surprise takeover bid as rival US firm swoops in
news_bbc.summary: The airline says a bid from US firm Apollo has trumped a previous potential takeover offer from Castlelake.

news_bbc.title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
news_bbc.summary: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.

news_bbc.title: Vapes to have less enticing names to protect children, under UK plans
news_bbc.summary: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using of enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.

news_bbc.title: We've saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
news_bbc.summary: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

news_bbc.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn in mega US share sale
news_bbc.summary: The shares are set to start trading on the Nasdaq on Friday in what will be the largest ever debut by a foreign firm.

news_bbc.title: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
news_bbc.summary: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.

news_bbc.title: Big fall in oil, gas and cargo ships taking US-backed Hormuz route after new strikes
news_bbc.summary: Data shows a decline in the number of ships - many carrying oil and gas - going through the waterway after attacks this week.

news_bbc.title: Why electric cars cost more to insure - and what's being done about it
news_bbc.summary: The insurance cost of electric vehicles is still putting off many would-be buyers. So what can be done about it?
